response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional seniority and software craftsmanship across 20 years, this role requires deep C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge. The candidate's background is primarily web/SaaS development with only 6 months of C++ experience from over a decade ago. The complete absence of industrial automation, IoT, cybersecurity, or systems programming experience presents insurmountable gaps for a role requiring immediate productivity in secure, high-performance systems development.
strengths: Exceptional seniority (20 years) with proven leadership, mentoring, and software craftsmanship skills
Strong testing and quality mindset (TDD, testing workshops, open-source quality libraries)
Full-stack adaptability across web, mobile, desktop, infrastructure, and tooling domains
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (6 months in 2014–2015) versus the core 8–12 year requirement
Zero industrial automation, IoT, cybersecurity, or systems programming background
Last decade focused on web/JavaScript development with recent career gap (6+ months)
